predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_citizen_of_union
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
predicates.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the foreigner is current and real.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of at least one objective criterion.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel/identity document, is recognised by their country's authority, or falls under a direct laissez-passer nationality category.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: did_not_apply_for_international_protection_within_period
predicates.description: The foreigner did not make an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: Criterion 1: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory period.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The foreigner committed fraud or used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: Criterion 2: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementing or supervising compliance with regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: Criterion 3: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_public_order_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those referred to in criterion 4.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: Criterion 4: the foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, freedom-restricting, public order, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: Criterion 5: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_adverse_decision
predicates.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or a pushback or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: Criterion 6: the foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence, pushback, or removal decision.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The foreigner, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: Criterion 7: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The foreigner has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which resulted in a negative decision or did not lead to the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: Criterion 8: the foreigner has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The foreigner, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: Criterion 9: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
predicates.description: The foreigner declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: Criterion 10: the foreigner declared or their file shows they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: Criterion 11: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
